[Central Baltic] LATVIAN NAV WARN 019/26
CENTRAL BALTIC
VENTSPILS SOUTHWESTWARDS
TACTICAL EXERCISES “RONIS 2026” IN PROGRESS ON JUL 01 IN AREA
WITH A RADIUS OF 7 NM FROM CENTER PSN  57-17.00N 021-17.00E.
CAUTION ADVISED
INFORMATION ON RESTRICTIONS ON VHF CH 16
CANCEL THIS MSG ON 012100 UTC JUL
